channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken pavement slabs, 7th May
item.description:
Four broken slabs (minimum) uneven surface. Problem has been a constant one as car drivers use my drive as a turning point in the close .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lyminge Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 134 Brondesbury Road, 7th May
item.description:
An ongoing litter problem at the location shown in the attached photos. This is the same spot I have had to report repeatedly, every couple of weeks, yet the area continues to be left uncleaned. Rubbish, cigarette ends, beer cans and general litter regularly accumulate around the green utility box and wall area, creating an unpleasant environment. I have also noticed road sweepers passing by without addressing the issue. Could you please ensure this location is cleaned properly and included in more regular street cleaning going forward, as this has become a persistent problem rather than a one-off occurrence.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence, 7th May
item.description:
Broken fence and dangerous access to the drop into the river here . Near the Nugent bridge another shopping trolly in the river as well . . . so sorry !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The lamp column damaged last September has been replaced but there is no light fitying at the top of it., 7th May
item.description:
There aretwo damaged lamp columns in Motti gham Lane. One has been replaced but with no light fitting and further down past Carters Hill Close the remains of the column damaged by a motor accident last year has not even been replaced.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in car park, 7th May
item.description:
After 9.30am today (7th May) this builder's or decorators rubbish was illegally dumped in the car park of Avery Court, SE20 8BZ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin being used by a local resident for household rubbish, 7th May
item.description:
There's a local putting her household rubbish into the bin regularly - foxes have pulled out the rubbish and there's an envelope with her name and address - please contact me if you want her details.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side of 1 Eynsham Drive: black sack of rubbish., 7th May
item.description:
The sack of rubbish is along the pathway that leads to Boxgrove Road. It is near the gap next to the industrial units that run parallel to the pathway.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned caravan, 7th May
item.description:
This has been here for several weeks now. It is dilapidated and things are falling off it. Think people are probably taking bits off it while it sits there. All the windows are surrounded by foam and it is impacting on drivers in the high street. Also very near a children's nursery. Can it be removed? No number plate or wheels evident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 7th May
item.description:
Dumped mattress, always in this same spot. The council need to install a camera here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two mattresses and black sacks of household rubbish, 7th May
item.description:
Dumped on Marmadon. Black sacks contain rotting food and attracts vermin. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open suitcase, 7th May
item.description:
Open suitcase on ground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Reported this earlier this week, not cleared and now 10x worse, 7th May
item.description:
More rubbish and a fridge freezer have joined this fly tip. Bags contain food and as previously reported there is either animal or human waste left here too. Attracting vermin and blocking pavement access. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped material in alleyway, 7th May
item.description:
Fly tipped material in alley way from renovations/removals from 139 Norfolk crescent. This has been there for months and not moved or any action taken to remove the waste they put there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 137, Norfolk Crescent, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping, 7th May
item.description:
Opposite 18 Clevedon Close, Smalley Rd estate, Stoke Newington

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clevedon Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Debris from trees, 7th May
item.description:
There is lots of tree debris on Austral Street that needs sweeping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Austral Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All drains blocked with dirt and debris, 7th May
item.description:
All drains along gordon road on both sides are blocked with dirt and debris that has run off of Parkside road when it rains This is now causing flooding at the bottom of the road when we have heavy rainfall
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gordon Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black sacks dumped, 7th May
item.description:
Containing household waste strewn along pavement and on the road. Bags are open and rotting food is attracting vermin. Also blocking pavement access. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping junction of Hadden Grove and Willersley Ave, 7th May
item.description:
Fly tipping
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Cedar Avenue, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On Brookedene junction with Bannockburn, 7th May
item.description:
Mattress and black sacks dumped. Sacks open and food spilling out onto pavement attracting vermin. Also blocking access to pavement. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 7th May
item.description:
Small BMW been parked up for months. No plates on the front but the plates on the back relate to a grey volkswagon

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
